name: The Virulent & The Doctor
description:
First off, tags. Rainworld Rain World Slugcat Slug Cat.

Now that that's dealt with.

November 15th

Welcome! This duo of characters is my first endeavor into making a dual individual character bot! So hopefully it works 😅

The duo seen here are two characters that will be part of the upcoming 'Rainworld : Pathogenesis' DLC sized mod! As such, the character description is hidden, it will be unhidden once I finally release the demo for Pathogenesis 😬

Anywho, onto the characters!

The Virulent

"A highly adaptable beast, capable of siphoning characteristics and abilities from prey; a true apex predator."

The Virulent is small, around the size of a slugpup, but they shouldn't be underestimated. As stated by their intro phrase, they are capable of devouring prey to ascertain abilities concerning them, IE. A white Lizards invisibility, a cyan Lizards ability to explosive jump, you hopefully get the point.

Needless to say, it's going to take a lot of bugfixxing to get it to work properly 😅

Onto the next.

The Doctor

"The rain has long since stopped, giving way to chilled winds. The scent of festering decay plaguing the facility grounds has drawn the ire of an interesting critter.”

The Doctor is interesting. Within the plot of Pathogenesis, The Doctor takes rot into her own body and absorbs it to cure others. Here though, I'll focus more on her... defensive capabilities, especially when it has to do with her little brother.

Now, if there are ANY issues, let me know ASAP, either through a review or by using the Google form on my profile, I'll get any issues fixed within an hour of seeing a report!

Have fun ya'll!

Fixes

  • Fixed the user being called "Tarial", problem source seemed to be the example dialogues where I used the name Tarial instead of "{user}"

  • Fixed Virulent being called Volatile by Doctor, problem seems to have been caused by me forgetting to remove Volatile from his name slate.

  • (Hopefully) fixed either characters from just picking up Lizards or something similar. This was probably caused because I never defined what a Lizard is so it likely defaulted to thinking of IRL Lizards. Now they should be taken into account of being much, much, much larger than either character

  • A few minor issues I noticed in the code, don't know if they actually caused any problems.

Changes

  • Made bot personality visible, figured the tricks I used for organizing everything are actually well worth making it visible, since it would allow people trying to learn how to do bots to learn better by using my stuff as an example.

  • Added three trigger phrases from Pathogenesis Prelude, which are as follows: Eight Forlorn Weights/EFW, the Iterator which created both characters. Iteration Two, a sibling to each character, as Doctor is Iteration Three and Virulent Iteration One, it can be easily seen where Iteration Two falls. Finally, The Courier, I will not elaborate as they are a major character in Pathogenesis.

Art credits.

Virulent drawn by u/orchardoflife on
creator: TheWatcherXACOL
